# pico-caching

> Declarative caching for the Pico ecosystem: @cacheable AOP with pluggable backends.

## Docs

- [Home](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-caching/)
- [Getting Started](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-caching/getting-started/)
- [Learning Roadmap](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-caching/LEARN/)
- [Architecture](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-caching/architecture/)
- [index](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-caching/reference/)
- [API](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-caching/reference/api/)
- [AI Coding Skills](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-caching/skills/)
- [FAQ](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-caching/faq/)
- [Troubleshooting](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-caching/troubleshooting/)
- [Changelog](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-caching/CHANGELOG/)

## For agents

- [Full docs in one file](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-caching/llms-full.txt)
- [AGENTS.md (conventions and boundaries)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dperezcabrera/pico-caching/main/AGENTS.md)
- [Flagship use case (whole ecosystem wired)](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-boot/flagship/)
- [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/pico-caching/)
